name: Map Markers
author: roquerodrigo
description:
Drop draggable markers on the map to plan where future stations could go — each with a color, an icon and a name, plus an optional influence radius showing a candidate station's walkable catchment.

Spacing guides mark the ideal distance between markers, and a magnetic snap pulls a dragged marker onto it, so the catchments tile with no gap and no excess overlap. The overlay fades while the panel is closed, keeping it a background sketch while you play.

Markers belong to the save you have loaded, so separate games in the same city keep separate sketches. The mod never touches routes, tracks, trains or stations — it only draws its own overlay.
